mapper.select:
select c.notice_id as noticeId, c.id as targetId, c.notice_type, c.notice_title, c.message_content, c.target_type ,c.created_time as createdTime
,read_state as readState
from user_notice_target c left join agent_info ag on ag.agent_account=c.user_account
where c.target_type = 5 and c.delete_state=2 and c.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType} order by readState asc, createdTime desc

select count(c.id) from agent_notice c left join agent_info ag on ag.agent_account=c.agent_account where c.target_type = 2 and c.delete_state=2 and c.agent_account = #{agentAccount} and c.notice_type = 3 and c.read_state=0

select count(c.id) from user_notice_target c left join agent_info ag on ag.agent_account=c.user_account where c.target_type = 2 and c.delete_state=2 and c.agent_acuser_accountcount = #{agentAccount} and c.notice_type = 3 and c.read_state=0
